en.name: MAGMA Protocol
en.short_description: Narrative capital markets on Solana. Back what you believe. Earn while you wait.
en.long_description:
MAGMA is a narrative capital markets protocol built for Solana Mobile. Submit a market thesis, back it with SOL or SPL tokens, and earn DeFi yield on your capital while the AI oracle resolves each narrative.

Features:
- Voice or text narrative submission
- 7-agent AI pipeline generates full narrative kit in ~55 seconds
- Back narratives with SOL, SKR, or 14 other SPL tokens
- Earn Kamino, Meteora, and Jupiter Lend yield while narratives resolve
- Conviction Score system rewards accurate early backers
- Echo Pool distributes monthly to top conviction holders
- Native Seeker phone + SKR integration
- Metaplex Core NFT collections (Lava Tier Cards + Genesis Origin Cards)
en.new_in_version: Initial release. Full narrative capital markets protocol on Solana devnet.
